LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER SHANNON ARAKAKI'S PETITION FOR ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS DENIED. SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE SUPPORTS ADMINISTRATIVE DETERMINATION AND NO DUE PROCESS VIOLATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189.

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Joshua Watson, Esq. of The Dolan Law Firm, 415-421-2800 for petitioner and moving party Shannon Arakaki
John Shanley, Esq. 553-9766 for respondent and opposing party City and County of San Francisco

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
PETITIONER SHANNON ARAKAKI'S Petition For Administrative Mandamus is denied. Substantial evidence supports administrative determination and no due process violation. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189. (301/PJB/JF)
